flags.title: Application timing may be outside the lodgement window
flags.why_it_matters: The Temporary Graduate visa must be lodged within a defined window after completing studies. Missing this window means becoming ineligible for this pathway.
actions: Confirm your course completion date and calculate the lodgement window
Lodge as early as possible once eligible
Ensure you hold a bridging visa if your current visa expires before lodgement

flags.title: Selected visa stream may not match your circumstances
flags.why_it_matters: The 485 visa has two streams: Graduate Work (for specific skilled occupations) and Post-Study Work (for higher degree holders). Selecting the wrong stream can result in ineligibility.
actions: Confirm which stream applies to your qualification and occupation
Graduate Work stream requires an occupation on the relevant skilled occupation list
Post-Study Work stream requires an Australian degree (Bachelor, Masters or Doctoral)

flags.title: Police check may be missing or expired
flags.why_it_matters: Applicants who have spent 12 or more months in certain countries must provide a police clearance certificate. Missing or expired police checks are a common cause of processing delays.
actions: Obtain police clearance certificates from all countries where you have lived for 12+ months
Ensure each certificate is current — most must be obtained within 12 months of application
Include certified translations for non-English certificates

flags.title: English language evidence may be insufficient or expired
flags.why_it_matters: The 485 visa requires evidence of functional English. IELTS/PTE/TOEFL scores expire. Native English speakers or Australian degree holders may be exempt but should confirm their exemption basis.
actions: Confirm whether your English test result is still valid
Check if you qualify for an exemption (e.g. citizen of English-speaking country, Australian degree completed in English)
Resit the English test if your scores have expired
evidence_examples: IELTS, PTE, TOEFL, OET, or Cambridge test result
Letter confirming degree delivered in English

flags.title: Health examination not completed
flags.why_it_matters: All 485 applicants must meet health requirements. Health examinations are conducted by approved panel physicians and results are submitted directly to Home Affairs.
actions: Book a health examination with an approved panel physician
Complete the examination early — results can take several weeks
Check if results from a recent related visa application can be reused
evidence_examples: HAP ID confirming health examination booked
